name: 12L GPTQ-ActOrder + Int6 Bitpacking + Stride-32 + SGD TTT
blurb: Star 8: SGD TTT + GPTQ ActOrder + IZL + Int6 Bitpacking + Stride-32. 12 transformer layers (up from 11), GPTQ with Hessian-sorted column ordering (-0.002–0.004 BPB expected), 6-bit bitpacking (4 values→3 bytes, 25% smaller than int8), stride-32 sliding window eval, zstd-22 compression. All params unfrozen during TTT. Built on PR #414 stack with Parallel Muon (PR #393) and Legal Score-First TTT (PR #461).
author: bochuandu
